rationale: The reported proximity of a US-Iran deal and Khamenei's death represent a qualitative shift in energy market outlook relevant to Romania; Black Sea/Ukraine front remains unchanged.

top_events.title: Iran deal near as Khamenei dies, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal appears imminent following Khamenei's death, potentially easing energy prices that affect Romanian households. Lebanon fighting persists but deal momentum is new.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea security unchanged
top_events.summary: No new escalation near Romania's border or in the Black Sea this cycle. Situation remains at background level.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspended for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricts Anthropic AI access for non-US nationals; minor indirect effect on Romanian digital economy and tech sector.
